title: Fundamental Concepts of Group Theory
description: A flowchart showing the hierarchical relationship between core algebraic structures, culminating in the definition of a Group, with key examples.
relationships: A Set is equipped with a Binary Operation
The Binary Operation must satisfy Closure on the Set
The operation must also satisfy Associativity
The Set must contain an Identity Element for the operation
Every Element must have an Inverse Element within the Set
A structure satisfying all these properties is a Group
